title: Comprehensive Codebase QA Review — AI-Hardened Edition v5.1

phases.name: Phase 0: Codebase Inventory and Mental Map

tasks.description: Read root directory listing and identify all top-level folders
tasks.acceptance: Directory listing captured, folder purposes documented

tasks.description: Read dependency manifests (requirements.txt, package.json, etc.) and catalog all dependencies with versions
tasks.acceptance: All dependencies listed with versions, suspicious packages flagged

tasks.description: Read README.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, USAGE.md and extract all user-facing claims
tasks.acceptance: Claims extracted and broken into atomic obligations

tasks.description: Read CI/CD workflows (.github/workflows/) and identify public surfaces and trust boundaries
tasks.acceptance: All workflows analyzed, trust boundaries mapped

tasks.description: Produce mental map: tech stack, directory layout, public surface inventory, trust boundary inventory, estimated file count
tasks.acceptance: Mental map documented in context.md

tasks.description: Dispatch Config & Infrastructure explorer subagent for dotfiles, CI/CD, Dockerfiles, lockfiles
tasks.acceptance: Config explorer returns candidate findings for all infrastructure files

tasks.description: Dispatch Batch 1: Core source files explorer (max 20 files) for Check Groups 1-3
tasks.acceptance: Batch 1 explorer returns candidates with file paths, line numbers, disprove_attempts for CRITICAL/HIGH

tasks.description: Dispatch Batch 2: Core source files explorer (max 20 files) for Check Groups 4-6
tasks.acceptance: Batch 2 explorer returns candidates with file paths, line numbers, disprove_attempts for CRITICAL/HIGH

tasks.description: Dispatch Batch 3: Core source files explorer (max 20 files) for Check Groups 7-9
tasks.acceptance: Batch 3 explorer returns candidates with file paths, line numbers, disprove_attempts for CRITICAL/HIGH

tasks.description: Dispatch Test files explorer for test quality analysis (Check Group 8)
tasks.acceptance: Test explorer returns candidates for all test files

tasks.description: Dispatch Documentation explorer for claim verification (Check Group 4)
tasks.acceptance: Doc explorer returns claim-vs-implementation mismatches

tasks.description: Dispatch Cross-Boundary explorer with accumulated findings for contract/integration seam checks
tasks.acceptance: Cross-boundary explorer returns findings for module boundaries, shared state, import chains

phases.name: Phase 2: Candidate Validation and Inline Routing

tasks.description: Dispatch Reviewer Batch 1: Validate Config & Infrastructure candidates
tasks.acceptance: Reviewer returns CONFIRMED/DISPROVED/UNVERIFIED/PRE_EXISTING for all config candidates

tasks.description: Dispatch Inline Critic for CRITICAL/HIGH from Config Reviewer Batch 1
tasks.acceptance: Critic returns UPHELD/DOWNGRADED/OVERTURNED/REFINED for all CRITICAL/HIGH config findings

tasks.description: Dispatch Reviewer Batch 2: Validate Core Source Batch 1 candidates
tasks.acceptance: Reviewer returns validation results with inline_routing for all source batch 1 candidates

tasks.description: Dispatch Inline Critic for CRITICAL/HIGH from Source Batch 1
tasks.acceptance: Critic challenges all CRITICAL/HIGH from source batch 1

tasks.description: Dispatch Reviewer Batch 3: Validate Core Source Batch 2 candidates
tasks.acceptance: Reviewer returns validation results with inline_routing for all source batch 2 candidates

tasks.description: Dispatch Inline Critic for CRITICAL/HIGH from Source Batch 2
tasks.acceptance: Critic challenges all CRITICAL/HIGH from source batch 2

tasks.description: Dispatch Reviewer Batch 4: Validate Core Source Batch 3 candidates
tasks.acceptance: Reviewer returns validation results with inline_routing for all source batch 3 candidates

tasks.description: Dispatch Inline Critic for CRITICAL/HIGH from Source Batch 3
tasks.acceptance: Critic challenges all CRITICAL/HIGH from source batch 3

tasks.description: Dispatch Reviewer Batch 5: Validate Test candidates
tasks.acceptance: Reviewer returns validation results with inline_routing for all test candidates

tasks.description: Dispatch Inline Critic for CRITICAL/HIGH from Test Reviewer
tasks.acceptance: Critic challenges all CRITICAL/HIGH test findings

tasks.description: Dispatch Reviewer Batch 6: Validate Documentation candidates
tasks.acceptance: Reviewer returns validation results for all documentation candidates

tasks.description: Dispatch Inline Critic for CRITICAL/HIGH from Doc Reviewer
tasks.acceptance: Critic challenges all CRITICAL/HIGH documentation findings

tasks.description: Dispatch Reviewer Batch 7: Validate Cross-Boundary candidates
tasks.acceptance: Reviewer returns validation results for all cross-boundary candidates

tasks.description: Dispatch Inline Critic for CRITICAL/HIGH from Cross-Boundary Reviewer
tasks.acceptance: Critic challenges all CRITICAL/HIGH cross-boundary findings

tasks.description: Persist all explorer candidate findings as qa_candidate_findings evidence bundles
tasks.acceptance: All candidate findings saved to .swarm/evidence/qa_findings/

tasks.description: Persist all reviewer validation results as qa_validated_findings evidence bundles
tasks.acceptance: All validation results saved to .swarm/evidence/qa_validated/

tasks.description: Persist all critic results as qa_critic_results evidence bundles
tasks.acceptance: All critic results saved to .swarm/evidence/qa_critique/

tasks.description: Verify all CRITICAL/HIGH candidates have disprove_attempt fields, downgrade any missing
tasks.acceptance: All CRITICAL/HIGH have valid disprove_attempts, non-compliant downgraded to MEDIUM

tasks.description: Load and deduplicate all qa_candidate_findings, qa_validated_findings, qa_critic_results
tasks.acceptance: All evidence bundles loaded, duplicates identified

tasks.description: Drop all DISPROVED and OVERTURNED findings from main report set
tasks.acceptance: DISPROVED and OVERTURNED findings excluded from final set

tasks.description: Cluster confirmed findings by AI failure mode pattern
tasks.acceptance: Findings grouped by pattern: phantom-dependency, happy-path-only, off-by-one, etc.

tasks.description: Build claim ledger: supported, partially_supported, unsupported, contradicted, stealth_change
tasks.acceptance: Claim ledger complete with counts for each category

tasks.description: Count findings by check group (1-9) and severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/INFO)
tasks.acceptance: Count table produced with all group/severity combinations

tasks.description: Count validation outcomes: confirmed, disproved, unverified, pre_existing
tasks.acceptance: Validation statistics documented

tasks.description: Count inline critic outcomes: upheld, refined, downgraded, overturned
tasks.acceptance: Critic statistics documented

tasks.description: Count inline reviewer finalization outcomes: finalized, downgraded
tasks.acceptance: Finalization statistics documented

tasks.description: Generate qa-report.md with executive summary and findings count table
tasks.acceptance: Report header and summary sections complete

tasks.description: Document all CRITICAL findings with full detail in report
tasks.acceptance: All CRITICAL findings in report with file, line, problem, fix, evidence

tasks.description: Document all HIGH findings with full detail in report
tasks.acceptance: All HIGH findings in report with file, line, problem, fix, evidence

tasks.description: Document all MEDIUM findings with full detail in report
tasks.acceptance: All MEDIUM findings in report with file, line, problem, fix, evidence

tasks.description: Document all LOW/INFO findings (condensed) in report
tasks.acceptance: LOW/INFO findings in report

tasks.description: Document pre-existing findings section in report
tasks.acceptance: Pre-existing findings section complete

tasks.description: Document unsupported/contradicted claims section in report
tasks.acceptance: Claim mismatches documented

tasks.description: Document stealth changes section in report
tasks.acceptance: Stealth changes documented

tasks.description: Document dominant AI failure modes section in report
tasks.acceptance: AI pattern analysis complete

tasks.description: Document supply chain and dependency notes in report
tasks.acceptance: Dependency findings documented

tasks.description: Document coverage notes section in report
tasks.acceptance: Coverage gaps and unverified items noted

tasks.description: Document validation notes with all statistics in report
tasks.acceptance: Validation statistics in report

tasks.description: Document recommended remediation order in report
tasks.acceptance: Prioritized fix order documented
